$description: Solidigm elevation / shadow tokens. Sparse by design — the brand uses minimal elevation. Most surfaces are flat.

card.$description: Floating card on light backgrounds (e.g., office map cards).

dropdown.$description: Dropdown menus, tab panels, content hub filters.

overlay.$description: Stronger emphasis dropdown — for high-contrast surfaces.

feature.$description: Feature glow on dark surfaces (cookie preferences, modal on dark theme).

indicator.$description: Inset-style purple indicator under active tabs.

com.solidigm.brand.rationale: Elevation was ad-hoc: 5 unique shadow strings across the codebase. Consolidated to 5 named tokens covering all observed usage. The minimalism is intentional — Solidigm is a flat-design brand.
com.solidigm.brand.evidence: Audit of Storybook+AEM: only 5 unique box-shadow declarations across the entire codebase.
